title: Monitoring of Deployed Workers and Submission of Reports.
content: 58 Commencing from the deployment of its hired seafarer until the expiration of the term of 59 their contract, the LMA, in coordination with the principal, shall monitor the status or 60 53 condition of its deployed seafarer and submit a corresponding quarterly report to the 1 Department. It shall likewise immediately act on complaints or problems brought to its 2 attention and submit corresponding reports to the Department. 3 4 In case of significant or critical incidents such as but not limited to death, injury, 5 abandonment, detention, physical/sexual abuse, maltreatment, accidents, missing, 6 runaway, or emergency medical assistance of a seafarer, the shipowner and the LMA 7 shall submit, within five (5) calendar days from being informed of the incident, a report of 8 the incident. The shipowner and LMA shall provide periodic bi-monthly reports on the 9 actions taken to the seafarer’s family or the next-of-kin and the Department as applicable 10 until the matter is resolved. 11 12 Failure to comply with the foregoing reportorial requirements shall be meted the 13 corresponding penalties as provided in these Rules. 14 15
